purpose: Rerun the Gap A global carrier witness map using direct endpoint hits or indexed 30-entry carrier-law witnesses.
boundary: This does not close Gap A.
This completes the global witness map under the direct-or-indexed witness rule.
Indexed 30-entry carrier-law witnesses are representation evidence, not direct endpoint equality.
This is not yet a full global source-law predicate evaluation.

witness_rule.name: direct_or_indexed_global_witness
witness_rule.definition: A column has a global witness if it has either a direct endpoint hit in global carrier records or an indexed witness in a 30-entry global carrier-law table.
witness_rule.indexed_mode: same column index represented in a 30-entry carrier-law table
witness_rule.caution: Indexed witness mode is weaker than direct endpoint agreement.

column_records.boundary_note: indexed witnesses are representation evidence, not direct endpoint agreement

claim.short_form: Under direct-or-indexed witness mode, all 30 columns and all 18 WXYZTI rows have global carrier witnesses.
claim.not_closed_reason: A complete global witness map is still not a full global source-law predicate evaluation.

interpretation.main_result: The global carrier witness table is complete once indexed 30-entry carrier-law witnesses are admitted as representation evidence.
interpretation.important_caution: Only 5 columns show indexed endpoint agreement; the rest rely on indexed representation, so this is not endpoint-level proof.
interpretation.next_move: Evaluate whether the normalized source law can be stated as a global indexed-carrier predicate over this complete witness table.

checks.detail: complete witness map only, not predicate proof
